text: All comparables have been found on the eastside of Bloomington, IL and were selected to demonstrate the marketability of houses of a similar location, age, design, quality, and updated condition. Due to recent market trends the comparables have received a market time adjustment of 5.9% based on the sales statistics chart included in this report. Comparable #1 has been adjusted for its site size and age. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its site size, quality, bathroom count, GLA, and lack of a fence. Comparable #3 has been adjusted for its bathroom count, GLA, and basement. See Comparable #4.
